name: io.github.MirrorEthic/temporal-mcp
title: temporal-mcp
description: Wall-clock awareness for LLM agents. Two tools: elapsed-time-between-turns + day rollover detection.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token. Pick any opaque string (UUID, passphrase, etc.) — we SHA-256 hash it for storage and never see the original. The token is your private key for your timeline. Example: 'Bearer 8c7d4b8a-...'
